overview.short: Muthyalamaduvu is a tourist attraction located near Anekal, Bengaluru Urban, Karnataka.
overview.description: Muthyalamaduvu is a tourist attraction located near Anekal, Bengaluru Urban, Karnataka. The place is also known as Pearl Valley. It is located 5km from Anekal and 40km from Bangalore. From the Anekal-Thally Road, visitors take a right turn to reach Muthyalamaduvu.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Agasa Thimmanahalli
topPlaces.description: Agasa Thimmanahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Anekal taluk of Bangalore urban district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: A Medihalli
topPlaces.description: A Medihalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Anekal taluk of Bangalore district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Kugur
topPlaces.description: Kugur is a cultural heritage village in the Anekal taluk of Bangalore district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is located near Sarjapura.

topPlaces.name: Anekal
topPlaces.description: Anekal (ಆನೇಕಲ್) is a major town and taluk of Bengaluru Urban district, part of the Bangalore Metropolitan Region. It is a major town in the suburbs of Bengaluru.

topPlaces.name: Adur, Bengaluru South
topPlaces.description: Adur (Bangalore South) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Bangalore South taluk of Bangalore district.

topPlaces.name: Anekal derailment
topPlaces.description: The Anekal derailment occurred at 7.35 a.m. on 13 February 2015, when nine coaches of the Ernakulam-bound Intercity Express derailed near Anekal in the Bangalore Urban district of Karnataka, India.

topPlaces.name: Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram
topPlaces.description: The Vinnarasi Madha Church, officially known as Our Lady of Queen of Heaven Church, is a Roman Catholic quasi-parish church located in the village of Gopasandiram. It operates under the direct administration of the Dharmapuri Diocese.

topPlaces.name: Gopasandiram, Thally
topPlaces.description: Gobasandiram is a small village in Thally Block in Krishnagiri District of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Kottamadugu Panchayat.

items.note: Agasa Thimmanahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Anekal taluk of Bangalore urban district in Karnataka.
A Medihalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Anekal taluk of Bangalore district in Karnataka.
Kugur is a cultural heritage village in the Anekal taluk of Bangalore district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is located near Sarjapura.
Anekal (ಆನೇಕಲ್) is a major town and taluk of Bengaluru Urban district, part of the Bangalore Metropolitan Region. It is a major town in the suburbs of Bengaluru.
Adur (Bangalore South) is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Bangalore South taluk of Bangalore district.
The Anekal derailment occurred at 7.35 a.m. on 13 February 2015, when nine coaches of the Ernakulam-bound Intercity Express derailed near Anekal in the Bangalore Urban district of Karnataka, India.

itinerary.title: Day 3 — Vinnarasi Madha Church, Gopasandiram & around

items.note: The Vinnarasi Madha Church, officially known as Our Lady of Queen of Heaven Church, is a Roman Catholic quasi-parish church located in the village of Gopasandiram. It operates under the direct administration of the Dharmapuri Diocese.
Gobasandiram is a small village in Thally Block in Krishnagiri District of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Kottamadugu Panchayat.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Muthyalamaduvu?
faq.a: The best time to visit Muthyalamaduvu is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (57 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (34 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Muthyalamaduvu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Muthyalamaduvu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Muthyalamaduvu?
faq.a: Stays in Muthyalamaduvu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Muthyalamaduvu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Agasa Thimmanahalli, A Medihalli, Kugur, Anekal, Adur, Bengaluru South.
